headline: J&J starts head-to-head PFA trial against Boston Scientific device
summary: The study will compare outcomes on J&J’s Varipulse Pro platform and Boston Scientific’s rival Farapulse PFA system.

headline: Boston Scientific Trial Wins Highlight Growth Potential In Electrophysiology And Stroke Care
summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) released new clinical trial results for its FARAPULSE PFA Platform and WATCHMAN LAAC at Heart Rhythm 2026. The AVANT GUARD trial reported superiority of FARAPULSE PFA over anti arrhythmic drugs for persistent atrial fibrillation. Additional data backed the safety and effectiveness of the FARAFLEX PFA Catheter and WATCHMAN FLX LAAC therapies, with positive long term outcomes. For investors tracking NYSE:BSX, this batch of clinical data touches two key areas where...

headline: Massively Disappointing Boston Scientific (BSX) Stock Could Be Due for a Comeback
summary: Although a seemingly inopportune acquisition appears to have cost Boston Scientific dearly, the current valuation of BSX stock may be too enticing to pass up.

headline: Joby Aviation Is 'Too Risky,' But This Industrial Stock Is A 'Winner': Jim Cramer
summary: Cramer shared his thoughts on various stocks, calling Joby Aviation too risky, BillionToOne a winner, Boston Scientific caught in competition, Rocket Lab a winner, and Pinnacle West Capital a good company. He also endorsed Intuitive Machines as a speculative stock.
